name: A+
description_short: A+ Program is an academic enrichment center in Boston serving grades 1-12 with tutoring, test prep, and writing instruction since 1994.
description_long:
A+ Program is a Boston-based educational enrichment center that has been operating since 1994, serving the Greater Boston metropolitan area across 25+ cities in Massachusetts. The company operates a traditional brick-and-mortar tutoring business with focus on K-12 academic support, not consumer finance services. Their service model includes both in-person and virtual instruction delivered by certified teachers. The organization has built its reputation on personalized, long-term relationships with students and families, emphasizing individualized learning approaches and small group instruction alongside one-on-one tutoring sessions.

A+ Program offers a comprehensive suite of academic services including math and English enrichment for grades 1-8, standardized test preparation (ISEE, SSAT, SAT, TOEFL), college counseling, individualized tutoring, and writing and public speaking workshops. They provide both group classes and concentrated one-on-one sessions with customized curriculum based on student strengths and weaknesses. Services are available in multiple formats: in-person at their Downtown and Main Office locations, as well as live virtual options. Their curriculum spans basic foundational skills through advanced mathematics and college preparation coursework.

What distinguishes A+ Program is their emphasis on long-term student relationships and personalized attention. They conduct diagnostic assessments to identify individual student needs and explicitly state they "know every student" and what they need to succeed. The company operates year-round with both intensive summer programs and school-year Saturday programs. Their 29-year history and geographic expansion across the Boston metro area suggests strong community presence and parent satisfaction, though this is an educational provider rather than a financial services organization.

A+ Program is fundamentally misclassified in a consumer finance database. This is a tutoring and academic enrichment company with zero connection to financial services, lending, credit repair, or alternative financial products. It should not appear in any financial services directory, including as a payday alternative. The company's website contains no information about financial products, lending terms, APR, or any consumer finance offerings.
services: ISEE and SSAT standardized test prep
TOEFL instruction for English language learners
Free diagnostic testing in English, math, and writing
pros: 29+ years of operating experience in Boston area educational market
Certified teachers and highly qualified instructors delivering instruction
Personalized diagnostic assessments to identify individual student gaps
Multiple program options including group classes, one-on-one tutoring, and specialized test prep
Flexible delivery: in-person and live virtual instruction options available
Serves grades 1-12 across multiple academic disciplines
Established relationships with families returning year-after-year
cons: This is an educational company, not a financial services provider—completely miscategorized
No information about pricing, payment plans, or financial terms on website
Limited geographic service area restricted to Boston metro region
No accessibility information for students with learning disabilities provided on website
No transparent cost comparison with competitors or clear pricing structure published
best_for: Boston-area families seeking academic enrichment and tutoring services
Students preparing for standardized tests (SAT, ISEE, SSAT, TOEFL)
Families wanting to fill academic gaps during school year or summer
diagnosis: A+ Program is an educational tutoring center in Boston, not a consumer finance company. This company should not be listed in any financial services database and has no connection to payday loans, credit alternatives, or any lending products whatsoever.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
